THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLIHER, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE #223, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,705.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,705.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-05-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, SHOULD DEFENDANT FULLY AND TIMELY VACATE THE PREMISES OF ALL OCCUPANTS AND PERSONAL ITEMS BY, ON OR BEFORE EXPIRATION OF STAY, THEN JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND DEFENDANT SHALL OWN NO MONEY TO PLAINTIFF.
